products.name: Deputy
cons: Not built specifically for Courier & Delivery

content.verdict: For Courier & Delivery businesses, Workforce OS is purpose-built with automated crew dispatch, agency elimination, and industry-specific compliance tracking. Generic tools like Deputy and When I Work work for retail/office but lack the features Courier & Delivery companies need to save 60% on staffing costs.
